channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Kacey Musgraves Heads to the Desert for Coachella Weekend 2
item.description: 🌵 Kacey's taking on the desert vibes at Coachella Weekend 2! Who else is ready for some golden hour music magic? 🎶 #CoachellaBound #KaceyMusgraves

item.title: Massive Attack Announce New Single with Tom Waits
item.description: 🚨 Exciting collab alert! 🎶 Get ready for the unique sounds of Massive Attack and Tom Waits coming soon! 🎤🎸 #MusicNews #Collaboration

item.title: Japanese Breakfast Earns First Gold Record
item.description: 🌟✨ Major congrats to Japanese Breakfast on hitting gold record status! 📀🎶 Let's keep the party vibes going! 🎉 #GoldRecordCelebration

item.title: Bob Dylan Asked This Country Singer for Her Number. She’s Now Opening His Tour
item.description: 🎸 When legends collide! Get ready for an epic tour combo with Bob Dylan and this rising country star! 🔥 #musicnews #BobDylan

item.title: Justin Bieber Sees Huge Streaming Surge After Headlining Coachella
item.description: 🎉 Bieber fever strikes again as fans stream his Coachella performance on repeat! 🔥🎶 #BeliebersUnite
